data: dabei - thereby, in doing so, at the same time
damals - back then, at that time
damit - so that, in order that
daneben - beside it, next to it
davor - before (in time), in front of (in space)
demnächst - soon, in the near future
gleichzeitig - simultaneously, at the same time
meinetwegen - as far as I'm concerned, for all I care
plötzlich - suddenly, all of a sudden
sehr viel - a lot, very much
soweit - as far as, to the extent that
damit - so that, in order that
denn - for, because (used in questions or conditional sentences)
denn auch - for, because (used to emphasize a reason)
nicht nur ... sondern auch - not only ... but also
sofern - provided that, as long as
sondern auch - not only ... but also
wie auch - as well as, just like
angesichts - in the face of, considering
anhand - by means of, based on
anstatt - instead of, in place of
entsprechend - corresponding to, in accordance with
gemäß - according to, in accordance with
infolge - due to, as a result of
statt - instead of, in place of
vor - before, in front of, ago
wegen - because of, on account of
zufolge - according to, as a consequence of
zuliebe - for the sake of, in favor of
können - can, to be able to
suchen - to search, to look for
aussehen - to look like, to appear
freuen - to be glad, to rejoice
gelten - to apply, to be valid
nachdenken - to think about, to reflect
überlegen - to consider, to think about
